turns.name: CHIEF JUSTICE REHNQUIST
turns.text: The opinion of the Court in No. 90-634 Cohen versus Cowles Media Company will be announced by Justice White.

turns.name: JUSTICE WHITE
turns.text: This case for reasons that are stated in an opinion on file with the clerk, we reverse the judgment of the Supreme Court of Minnesota and remand the case. Justice Blackmun has filed a dissenting opinion. He is joined by Justices Marshall and Souter. Justice Souter has also filed a dissenting opinion. Justices Marshall, Blackmun, and O'Connor had joined his opinion.
